result.stdout:
conductorsharp 3.0.0-alpha1
Copyright (C) 2022 Codaxy
Usage: dotnet conductorsharp [options]

  -f, --file        (Default: conductorsharp.yaml) Configuration file

  -n, --name        Specifies names of the tasks and workflows to scaffold

  -a, --app         Specifies owner apps of the tasks and workflows to scaffold

  -e, --email       Specifies owner emails of the tasks and workflows to
                    scaffold

  --no-tasks        (Default: false) Skip task scaffolding

  --no-workflows    (Default: false) Skip workflow scaffolding

  --dry-run         (Default: false) Print which workflows would be scaffolded

  --help            Display this help screen.

  --version         Display version information.
